mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month momentum in retail sales signals resilient household demand and upward revisions to near-term earnings expectations, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot shows RSAFS available with one-month reporting lag
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month RSAFS momentum is followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in no more than 50% of observations over a 3-year walk-forward window.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in unemployment signals deteriorating labor income and recession risk, causing investors to reduce earnings expectations and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if triggered unemployment increases are followed by nonnegative median 60-day S&P 500 returns, or if the downside hit rate is below 55% across rolling 5-year samples.

mechanism_narrative: Rising inflation combined with a rising federal funds rate tightens financial conditions and raises equity discount rates, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 6-month annualized growth exceeds its 12-month growth and FEDFUNDS rises over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot shows CPIAUCSL at 278.88 and FEDFUNDS at 0.08
failure_condition: Reject if triggered inflation-and-rate tightening episodes produce average 20-day S&P 500 returns greater than the unconditional average in two consecutive 3-year walk-forward windows.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in housing starts below their prior 12-month average signals weakening construction activity and household balance-sheet stress, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses below its trailing 12-month average
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST downside crossings are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of triggered instances over the walk-forward sample.

mechanism_narrative: Positive industrial production momentum signals improving factory output and operating leverage, raising near-term earnings expectations and producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO 3-month change is positive after being negative in the prior month
failure_condition: Reject if positive INDPRO reversal triggers have a 20-day forward return mean less than or equal to zero and a hit rate below 50% in rolling 3-year tests.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating payroll growth without a simultaneous unemployment increase signals stronger income growth and lower recession probability, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month average change exceeds its 12-month average and UNRATE does not rise over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot shows PAYEMS at 148611.0 and UNRATE at 4.2
failure_condition: Reject if triggered payroll acceleration episodes fail to outperform unconditional 5-day S&P 500 returns by at least 5 basis points on average in rolling 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A falling federal funds rate signals policy support and lower discount rates, increasing equity valuation multiples and producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS declines by at least 0.25 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if 60-day S&P 500 returns after FEDFUNDS declines are below the unconditional median in more than 55% of triggered observations across rolling 5-year samples.

mechanism_narrative: Real activity strength across GDP and retail sales signals broad demand growth, improving revenue expectations and producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 year-over-year growth is positive and RSAFS growth exceeds CPIAUCSL growth over 6 months
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot shows GDPC1 at 19469.398, RSAFS at 639829.0, and CPIAUCSL at 278.88
failure_condition: Reject if triggered real-demand expansions do not produce positive average 20-day S&P 500 returns or if their rolling 3-year Rank IC is below 0.03.
